name: template-reschedule
description: Retrieve email composing guidelines for meeting rescheduling. Returns structured policy (required elements, tone, structure, constraints, example) that you use as instructions when composing the email — do NOT send the policy itself to the recipient. Supports three actions: 'generate' retrieves the policy; 'save' stores a custom policy in the knowledge graph; 'reset' reverts to the built-in default.

inputs.sender_name: string? (required for generate — the person on whose behalf you're rescheduling)
inputs.original_time: string? (required for generate — the original meeting time)
inputs.proposed_times: string? (required for generate — comma-separated new proposed times)
inputs.meeting_subject: string? (optional for generate — what the meeting was about)
inputs.reason: string? (optional for generate — brief reason for rescheduling)
inputs.custom_policy: string? (required for save — the policy to store)
